programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un infante de marina, el equipo de NCIS descubre un laberinto de cámaras espías que transmiten en vivo, escondidas en las habitaciones de un motel de Virginia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un músico de la banda más elitista de la Armada que actúa en eventos diplomáticos en todo el mundo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un suboficial que se transmitió en vivo en una popular aplicación de juegos. Además, Gibbs cuidará a su vecino de 11 años, Phineas (Jack Fisher), porque su madre debe irse en un viaje de última hora.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo ayudan a Ziva (Cote de Pablo) con “la única cosa” de la que dijo que tendría que encargarse antes de regresar con su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando aparece un video de oficiales participando en un claro caso de trampa, Frank se centra en encontrar al policía que filtró el video.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank pregunta si un encuentro con activistas comunitarios fue un accidente o una trampa. Jamie se esfuerza por depender menos de la información de Frank para tomar decisiones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que un ex oficial espera a Frank en un restaurante, se siente culpable por las circunstancias que rodearon el despido y trata de reintegrarla.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Un médium se acerca a Danny y Baez, afirmando saber qué le pasó a una mujer que fue encontrada muerta de un aparente suicidio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La BAU investiga a las víctimas que documentaban sus vidas personales y sus deseos internos en publicaciones de blogs y redes sociales. Además, Kevin se pone celoso cuando descubre que García puede tener un nuevo interés en el amor.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige al viejo barrio de Morgan en la ciudad de Chicago en busca de un sujeto cuyo objetivo son los hombres de mediana edad. Y una pista lleva a Morgan a creer que van tras alguien relacionado con el hombre que abusó de él cuando era niño.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando 25 años después se abre una cápsula del tiempo en un pequeño pueblo de Colorado y contiene una revelación espantosa, la UAC investiga ese crimen y un posible vínculo con la muerte de un oficial de policía local.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo ayudan a Ziva (Cote de Pablo) con “la única cosa” de la que dijo que tendría que encargarse antes de regresar con su familia.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Whitney and Mariel's feud escalates, while Samantha surprises a couple on behalf of her foundation.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Whitney and Mariel reconcile their friendship, Mariel finds a wedding venue, Samantha worries about her reproductive health, and Amber pushes forward with her racing career.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: The ladies head to Daytona for one of the most dangerous races of the season, and Amber struggles to land a sponsor.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Hostilities are renewed when Whitney and Mariel snub Ashley's invite to Kurt's birthday party, and Samantha helps Amber prepare for her big race at Hickory Motor Speedway.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Kyle helps Amber improve her lap time on the track, signaling to Samantha that she's ready for the big leagues, and Whitney tries to apologize for missing Kurt's birthday.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Steve Austin hosts this bunch of 12 rough and rowdy good old boys and girls on an uninhabited paradise, as they battle each other for $100,000 in cold hard cash.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A new redneck in peak physical condition arrives on the island challenging established relationships. The contestants are already tired of canned food, the contestants decide to hunt for an alternate protein source: LIZARD!

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: As the castaway rednecks hunt for jungle veggies, they learn that you shouldn¹t search for food in the area that used to be the latrine.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With one team dominating, Steve makes a surprise announcement that makes tensions run high on the island; the rednecks are excited about the arrival of some new critters in the camp and must decide where they fall on the food chain.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Redneck Island explodes with excitement when a crate of heavenly ice-cold beer washes up onshore. The party is short-lived, however, when Steve Austin informs them he has alternate plans for their precious beverage.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The remaining rednecks decide to liven up camp-life by pulling pranks on each other, building a waterslide, and giving some of the guys their first pedicures. All the primping and fun stops when one team loses the challenge.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The lines in the sand between the Orange and Blue teams get erased when Steve Austin makes a surprise visit to camp to announce a major shift in the competition: Contestants will now be competing individually instead of as teams.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: It is down to the final five. After a day of bowling and fishing, a sharp-shooting challenge makes one contestant safe from elimination while putting two others on the firing line.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With only four contestants remaining, alliances get put to the ultimate test. Meanwhile, contestants sink their teeth into their next challenge, literally, in an eating contest. The exotic fare proves challenging to stomach in many ways.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The final three contestants face their last series of challenges, as only two will battle it out to decide the winner of Redneck Island and the $100,000 grand prize.

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: Encuentran a un hombre esposado y apuñalado en su habitación de hotel, mientras que una broma en el laboratorio provoca una ruptura en el equipo de CSI y amenaza su investigación.

programme.title: Heredarás el viento

programme.title: Corona de Lagrimas

programme.title: Juan Colorado
programme.desc: El norteño Juan, se enamora de la machorra Silvia, pero, su padre la quiere casar con un tal Rafael, el cual por celos y envidia, se une al padre de Silvia, para acabar con Juan. Ella al darse cuenta de lo que sucede, se viste como Juan para salvarlo.

programme.title: Jóvenes y bellas
programme.desc: Un grupo de padres decide mandar a sus hijas a un campamento para alejarlas de la música rock, pero ahí ocurre lo que todo progenitor teme: sus pequeñas encuentran novio.

programme.title: La edad de la tentación
programme.desc: La negligencia de los padres que no asumen su responsabilidad en la educación sexual de los hijos provoca la ruina de muchas vidas.

programme.title: Guerra de razas
programme.desc: Inspirado en hechos reales. Para evitar que terroristas nacionales construyan una bomba sucia, un agente del FBI (Daniel Radcliffe) se infiltra en un grupo extremista, haciéndose pasar por uno de ellos.

programme.title: Justicia roja
programme.desc: Un estadounidense (Richard Gere) está en China por un viaje de negocios. Le acusan de un brutal asesinato y se encuentra a merced de un sistema judicial extranjero que no entiende. ¿Encontrará al verdadero asesino antes de que sea demasiado tarde?

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: Jamie Foxx presenta la inspiradora historia real del director de una banda de música de instituto que transformó a su variopinta banda de jazz en un legendario grupo de funk que arrasó en todo el país.

programme.title: Vidas al límite
programme.desc: Frank es un paramédico que está al borde de la locura por tantos años de salvar y perder vidas. Una noche, Frank conoce a Mary Burke, la hija de un hombre a quien Frank intentó salvar. Juntos, Frank y Mary enfrentarán a los fantasmas del pasado.

programme.title: La caza del Octubre Rojo
programme.desc: Un submarino nuclear ruso con tecnología superior se dirige a la costa de los EE.UU.; sin embargo, un analista de la CIA cree que el capitán va a desertar, y tiene apenas unas horas para probarlo.

programme.title: Juegos de guerra
programme.desc: Matthew Broderick, en una excitante y superentrenida película sobre un joven y experto informático que con su habilidad es capaz de poner en jaque al Departamento de Defensa de los Estados Unidos y porovocar la Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Cheri
programme.desc: A una famosa cortesana de ricos y famosos en el París previo a la Primera Guerra Mundial se le pide que enseñe a un niño de 19 años. La aventura que se convierte en un acalorado y apasionado asunto que resulta en luchas de poder y luchas por amor.

programme.title: La duquesa

programme.title: El Paciente Inglés

programme.title: La mejor Navidad
programme.desc: Gloria, enfocada en su trabajo en Miami después de su divorcio, envía a sus hijos a pasar la Navidad con su exmarido en Jalisco. Lo que no imaginan es que esta decisión les va a cambiar la vida.

programme.title: Los tuyos, los míos, y los nuestros
programme.desc: Un almirante viudo de la Guardia costera y una viuda diseñadora de bolsos se enamoran y se casan, para la consternación de sus hijos, ocho de él y diez de ella.

programme.title: Volando Alto
programme.desc: Gwyneth Paltrow protagoniza en esta comedia hilarante sobre una chica de pueblo con grandes planes. Cuando se propone ser azafata internacional de primera clase, Donna se arriesga y sale a perseguir su sueño.

programme.title: Volando Alto
programme.desc: Gwyneth Paltrow protagoniza en esta comedia hilarante sobre una chica de pueblo con grandes planes. Cuando se propone ser azafata internacional de primera clase, Donna se arriesga y sale a perseguir su sueño.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Rambo II: la misión
programme.desc: John Rambo is enviado a una misión al sureste de Asia para rastrear a unos prisioneros de guerra, pero termina enfrentando a soldados vietnamitas que resguardan los campos.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo se rehúsa a unirse a su amigo y antiguo mentor, el coronel Trautman en una misión en Afganistán. La misión falla y Trautman es capturado por tropas rusas. Ahora Rambo debe infiltrarse a la fortaleza rusa y salvar a su único amigo.

programme.title: Sid 6.7 La Máquina Asesina
programme.desc: Es una combinación de las personalidades de unos 200 asesinos famosos. Es Sid 6.7, una creación de realidad virtual diseñada para probar a la policía de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Sangre por sangre
programme.desc: El oficial John Kang sueña con una vida tranquila con su esposa e hija. Pero después de una operación fallida, su mundo se torna violento tras volverse el blanco de un posible asesinato a manos de un implacable jefe militar camboyano.

programme.title: Ejecutor
programme.desc: Despedido hace algún tiempo del FBI, Mark Kaminsky se pone en contacto con su anterior jefe, Shannon, cuyo hijo ha sido asesinado. Decidido a encontrar al asesino, Shannon necesita la ayuda de Kaminsky y se ofrece a reincorporarlo si tiene éxito.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: El que busca encuentra
programme.desc: Esperanza y Marcos son dos personas que creen en el destino y en el amor verdadero.

programme.title: Ilusiones S.A.
programme.desc: Para hacer feliz a su mujer, un hombre contrata a una empresa que crea fantasías para fingir que su nieto, quien los dejó hace años, es un hombre de bien. Pero el verdadero nieto, quien es en realidad un delincuente, se aparece exigiendo dinero.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Amor y monstruos
programme.desc: En un mundo lleno de monstruos, Joel (Dylan O’Brien) se entera de que su amor de la secundaria (Jessica Henwick) está a 130 kilómetros. Ahora, deberá sacar a su héroe interior y enfrentar peligros desconocidos para estar con la mujer de sus sueños.

programme.title: Los domésticos
programme.desc: Un matrimonio busca refugio en un mundo apocalíptico controlado por malvadas pandillas. Una de estas depravadas pandillas pone a la pareja en la mira, por lo que ellos harán lo que sea para sobrevivir.

programme.title: El lobo de snow hollow
programme.desc: El sheriff de un pueblo pequeño y su apático equipo de oficiales deben resolver una serie de asesinatos que ocurren en la luna llena. Mientras es consumido por la búsqueda del asesino, lucha por recordarse a sí mismo que los hombres lobo no existen...

programme.title: Pandemia lupina
programme.desc: Un joven fotógrafo de vida silvestre arriba al aeropuerto JFK infectado con una enfermedad extraña. Haciendo fila en la aduana, de repente se convierte en un hombre lobo. Las víctimas a las que muerde no mueren, sino que también se transforman.

programme.title: Los ojos del mal 2
programme.desc: See No Evil 2 revive la pesadilla de la primera película, cuando Jacob Goodnight se levanta de entre los muertos en la morgue de la ciudad luego de la matanza en el hotel Blackwell.

programme.title: Mimic
programme.desc: Del director ganador del Óscar, Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER), llega una batalla, el hombre y la naturaleza. El milagro de la ingeniería creado en el laboratorio evolucionó y comenzó a imitar al depredador más peligroso de todos: el humano.

programme.title: Portadores
programme.desc: Chris Pine protagoniza este intenso y cautivante thriller, Portadores. Es la terrorífica historia de cuatro adolescentes que descubren que son más peligrosos para sí mismos que el virus global mortal del que intentan escapar.

programme.title: Event Horizon: La nave de la muerte
programme.desc: En 2047, un equipo de astronautas se embarca en una misión para recuperar una nave espacial. Sin embargo, esta simple tarea los conducirá a algo mucho más aterrador de lo que imaginaban.

programme.title: Estrenando cuerpo
programme.desc: El cómico en aprietos Lance Barton sabe cómo es morir en escena. Pero cuando su vida toma un giro inesperado, directo al cielo, Lance está seguro de que ha habido un error.

programme.title: Querido Dios
programme.desc: Greg Kinnear protagoniza en este espíritu-levantador sobre un estafador que va de nada bueno al hacer el bien.

programme.title: La lista de al carajo
programme.desc: Luego de que su broma se sale de control, un estudiante comparte una lista con algunas de las cosas que desearía haber hecho distinto... y quizás aún pueda.

programme.title: Superhéroes: la película
programme.desc: A un adolescente huérfano le muerde una libélula radioactiva, dándole poderes sobrehumanos en esta parodia de películas como ‘Spider-Man’, ‘X-Men’ y ‘Los cuatro fantásticos’.

programme.title: Beavis y Butt-head, la película

programme.title: El ascenso
programme.desc: Dos asistentes del gerente principal de una corporación de supermercados compiten entre sí para ganarse un ascenso en la compañía.

programme.title: ¿Qué más podría pasar?

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Return of the Seven

programme.title: Guns of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: War Of The Wildcats
programme.desc: A confident oil baron and a determined cowboy are rivals for Oklahoma land and oil rights, and for the love of a pretty schoolteacher. The cowboy acts on behalf of the Indians, on whose land the oil is discovered.

programme.title: Oklahoma Annie
programme.desc: Woman gets involved in cleaning up corruption in her town in this raucous musical comedy.

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: John Huston directs Audrey Hepburn in this thrilling, romantic western about a woman who becomes the target of lawless racism and brutality when it is discovered that she was born to the Kiowa tribe but secretly adopted by a white frontier family.

programme.title: The Red Shoes
programme.desc: A young ballet dancer is torn between the man she loves and her pursuit to become a prima ballerina.

programme.title: Royal Wedding
programme.desc: Tom and Ellen Bowen are a brother and sister dance act whose show closes in New York. Their agent books them in London for the same period as the Royal Wedding.

programme.title: Moulin Rouge (1952)
programme.desc: Nominated for seven Academy Awards,® including Best Picture, and winner of two (1953, Best Art Direction-Set Decoration and Best Costume Design), this stunning biography of artist Henri de Toulouse-Lautrec is flawlessly directed by John Huston.

programme.title: Funny Face
programme.desc: Paris, the City of Light, shines even brighter when Audrey Hepburn and Fred Astaire team up for the only time and bring their luminous starpower to this exquisite musical featuring songs by George and Ira Gershwin.

programme.title: That Touch of Mink
programme.desc: Love arrives with a splash when a handsome and eligible tycoon and a beautiful working woman meet over a curbside mud puddle. He’s enchanted by her small town ways, she’s captivated by his romantic, debonair manner.

programme.title: Alfie
programme.desc: Alfie is not really a bad sort. It’s just that he has this overwhelming desire for the opposite sex. You might say that “birds’ are irresistible to him, sort of second nature.

programme.title: Frankie And Johnny
programme.desc: Join Elvis Presley and Donna Douglas for a riverboat ride of rollicking musical entertainment in this charming and sassy comic hit about a gambler and his lady love.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans plot to send an impostor of a captured English officer to kill Winston Churchill. Hogan plots how to foil the plan and keep the real officer alive.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: General Burkhalter comes to Stalag 13 determined to marry off his sister to Klink. Hogan has to find a planted German agent in the Underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tempts a Swedish scientist to defect.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Heroes need to get both a member of the French resistance and some bullet-proof vests out of Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans have set up a money-counterfeiting operation in the camp,and Hogan is planning on destroying it.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: An American prisoner of war has information on Hogan that he wants to sell to the Germans.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan takes Kinchloe to Paris to visit a friend of his who might help them get plans for the defense of Paris.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía descubre un carro agujereado de balas, un conductor extraviado y ningún testigo. ¿Será que la víctima fue raptada o ha sido asesinada?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un embrague de testigos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que una pelea callejera le quitó la vida a un campeón nacional de lucha libre, la policía tuvo que determinar si fue asesinado a sangre fría o en defensa propia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, el pornógrafo de San Francisco Artie Mitchell fue asesinado en su casa. Su hermano y socio comercial, que fue encontrado cerca del lugar con un rifle, luego confiesa haber disparado a Artie, pero la pregunta es si el disparo fue premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre, lo que hablaba del horror del crimen: el asesinato de dos niños pequeños y el apuñalamiento de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una pastilla amarga para tragar
programme.desc: Se cuenta la historia de la bombero Michelle Baker. Después de conocer al Dr. Maynard Muntzing, quedó embarazada de él. Después de esta noticia, ella se enfermaba siempre que estaban juntos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Paintball
programme.desc: En 1962, la gente de la pequeña ciudad de Hanford, California, perdió la sensación de paz cuando una de las vecinas, Marlene Miller, de 15 años, fue asesinada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Judy Southern llegó a casa del trabajo y recibió un disparo de un hombre armado que esperaba dentro. Su esposo llegó poco después, llamó a los servicios de emergencia y la llevó al hospital.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba casera estalló en una casa rural, la policía no tenía idea de quién era el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Honaker fue declarado culpable de violación, sodomía y agresión sexual agraviada y condenado a tres cadenas perpetuas en prisión. El sostuvo su inocencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trago de pecados
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva a un trío de asesinatos sin resolver que ocurrieron en Wichita Falls, Texas durante la década de 1980, detalla cómo un cuarto asesinato durante el mismo período le proporcionó a la policía más de lo que se dieron cuenta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Es musgo, no grama

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de elefante

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Inyección de venganza

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Land of Giants: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Witness the spectacle of the fearsome predator Giganotosaurus.

programme.title: The Giant Claw: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Zoologist Nigel Marvin travels back in time on a prehistoric safari.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Machines
programme.desc: In London in 1966, the Doctor and Dodo visit the new Post Office Tower and are introduced to the supercomputer, WOTAN.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Machines
programme.desc: WOTAN has put in motion its plan to dominate the world and has ordered its human subjects to construct the deadly War Machines in secret locations.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Machines
programme.desc: With WOTAN’s plans for world conquest about to reach fruition, the Doctor comes face-to-face with the unstoppable might of the War Machines.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Machines
programme.desc: The Doctor hatches a dangerous plan to capture a war machine and turn WOTAN’s creations against it.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Power of the Daleks
programme.desc: Ben and Polly suspect that the 'new' Doctor is really an imposter. The TARDIS lands on the planet Vulcan where a murder has been committed.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Power of the Daleks
programme.desc: Posing as an Examiner from Earth, the Doctor warns the scientist Lesterson of the dire consequences of reactivating the dormant Daleks.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Power of the Daleks
programme.desc: Polly is taken prisoner by the rebels who intend to use the Daleks to take control of the colony. The Doctor discovers that all three Daleks have now been reactivated.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Power of the Daleks
programme.desc: Lesterson is driven insane when he discovers that the Daleks are reproducing themselves and are preparing to seize control of the colony.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Power of the Daleks
programme.desc: Bragen leads the rebellion and takes control of the colony, killing Governor Hensell. But the Daleks are also ready to make their final move.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Power of the Daleks
programme.desc: As battle rages between the rebels and the loyal colonists, the Daleks begin their attack. The only chance of survival for the colony rests with the Doctor.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers archaeologists trying to find the lost tombs of the Cybermen.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: The Doctor and archaeologists discover the city of Telos isn't as dead as they assumed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: Trapped in the tombs, the Cybermen release their poisonous pets, Cybermats.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: How will the Doctor rid Telos of Cybermen once and for all?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Time Lords send the Doctor, Sarah, and Harry to Skaro at a point in time shortly before the creation of the Daleks. The Doctor's mission is to destroy his greatest enemy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor finds that some of Davros's fellow Kaleds are unhappy with the development of the Daleks. Sarah is forced to load a Thal war rocket with radioactive explosives.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor informs the Kaled government of Davros's experiments and they move to shut down the bunker. But Davros is one step ahead and prepares to take drastic action.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: When the Kaled dome is destroyed by the Thals' rocket, the war appears to be over and the Thals rejoice at their victory. But then, the Daleks appear and a massacre begins.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: With Harry and Sarah as his prisoners, Davros interrogates the Doctor, forcing him to reveal the future of the Daleks so that he can learn from their defeats to make them stronger.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Kaled scientific elite move to prevent the development of the Daleks while the Doctor prepares to destroy them forever. But is it already too late?

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: The Doctor and his companions arrive in a London very different from what they remember.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: The Doctor and Ian are captured and taken to the Dalek ship.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: Hiding on board the Dalek spaceship, Ian is taken to the mines of Bedfordshire.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: The Doctor, Susan and David discover a nearby firebomb, left by Robomen to destroy London.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: Ian and his friend Larry are chased by the Slyther, protecting the Bedfordshire mines.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: Barbara realises how to control the Robomen and orders an attack on the Daleks.

programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd/pit bull mix with severe aggression issues; a boxer's owners are concerned by her tendency to jump the six-foot backyard fence.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a man get over a fear of dogs so he can finally fulfill his children's request to adopt one of their own.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps actor and comedian Kathy Griffin with her two rescue dogs, Chance and Pom Pom, who are disobedient and territorial.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Doberman/Lab and a pit bull develop behavioral issues after not being walked for months; an Italian greyhound acts aggressively toward the men of the house.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Dave Glassman adopts pit bulls Blackjack and Memphis together, but one day during a barking fit, the two dogs turn on each other.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar works to dial down the bad behaviors of four problem dogs who won sessions at the PETCO auditions.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar celebrates the show's 100th episode with a grand reunion of many of the past guests and their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Daschund Lotus is very territorial; his aggression sends his owner Chari to the hospital; Cesar makes a house call to see Joey, a German Shepard who is territorial over the second story of his owner's home.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A French bulldog is nervous around other dogs and occasionally nips at people; a Vizsla who resists going outside due to her fear of cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple's Chihuahua mix terrorizes their mastiff and dominates the house; a pit bull is not growing out of his puppy behavior.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town, the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today, and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But, unfortunately, they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But, Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Colorado, Dog's on the hunt for a runner with more than a decade's worth of trouble with the law. But the fugitive's friends and family are reluctant to help Dog bring him in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Colorado chasing a young man with a taste for trouble. He's fled to Texas but with his family's house on the line Dog is willing to try a risky strategy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's hunt takes Dog far from the glittering hotels of Waikiki to the parts of Hawaii tourist rarely see, Oahu's ramshackle tent cities. The team searches for a woman who has lost almost everything, her home, her family and her spirit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's good friend and fellow bondsman Chris is running out of time. He has only days to find his fugitive or risk losing his business. In his hunt, Dog confronts duplicitous tipsters, vicious attack dogs, and hostile neighbors.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The bounty-hunter adventures of Duane "Dog" Chapman and his Posse are chronicled in this one hour "Best Of" special, featuring superlative memorable moments from the previous seven seasons.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog launches a high stake hunt through the desolate and dangerous mountain landscape of western Colorado in pursuit of a gun-loving survivalist with a million dollar bond on his head. Will Dog's plan of using brains over brawn work?

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian faces a massive challenge trying to save one of the biggest calves he's ever had to deliver. And farmer Rob, who lost a newborn two days ago, is fearing the worst.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Cat plays with "Tickle Me Elmo;" cute Cocker Spaniel dog laying on carpet, suddenly jumps up and smashes into camera lens; dog attacks bubbles.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: A lamb is rushed to the Huddersfield hospital with a ruptured eye. He needs surgery, but Matt's worried there might be a problem with the lamb's other eye. Peter operates on a Staffordshire Bull Terrier, Julian castrates a miniature pony.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dancing cockatoo; cat get the swing of things; opossum goes in circles.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Kitten jumps on big orange cat; pug attacks other dog's tail; rooster messes with dog.

programme.title: The Story of Lassie
programme.desc: For 50 years, she has represented all that is good about the enduring bonds between human beings and their dogs. She first leaped to stardom in the 1943 MGM film, Lassie Come Home.

programme.title: Animal Attractions
programme.desc: Our Pet Trainer 911 transforms an unruly dog who chews everything in sight into a disciplined companion. Does your dog need a vacation? Tips on pet-friendly hotels.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Skeldale Student vet Molly turns to the Yorkshire vet for help as she brings in her cat Marlo who appears to have been shot in the head. Julian has to perform emergency surgery.

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies
programme.desc: Puppies compete from across the area for the local title of "Los Angeles' Cutest Puppy" and a chance to compete for the national title! Will it be a guitar-playing Wheaten Terrier that croons his way to victory or a 3-legged pup that woos the crowd?

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies
programme.desc: The contest continues this week in the city of San Diego, where puppies come in all shapes and sizes! Will Marley, the big Bernese mountain dog, get a chance to kiss up to the judges or will they prefer a smaller package like My Shadow the Maltese?

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies
programme.desc: The city of "Pupperly" love plays host to this week's competition as the dogs get ready to duke it out, Rocky Balboa style! Will judges pick a pug pup wearing an NFL Eagles jersey or will a backward-walking pooch be the pick of the litter?

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies
programme.desc: In a state that holds one of the Seven Natural Wonders of the World, it's no wonder Arizona is also home to some of the nation's cutest puppies! Contestants will vie for the title of Phoenix's cutest puppy including a pooch born without front paws!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies
programme.desc: Don't let size fool you in this "city by the bay", these pooches may be small but they've got an overabundance of cuteness. Yorkies, street-rescues, & accessory-wearing pups are just some of the types you'll find here. Who will be crowned cutest pup?

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies
programme.desc: The competition heads South this week in search of Dixieland's top dog. While Georgia may be known for peaches, after seeing the crop of pooches in this land, they should be the "Puppy" state!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies
programme.desc: The puppies are coming! The puppies are coming! Freezing temperatures can't keep these Bostonians and their pups away. No matter how cold the weather, the puppies are all "Cheers" and by the end of the day everyone will know their name!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies
programme.desc: If these puppies can make it here, they can make it anywhere! Here in the Big Apple the pooches are dogged, audacious & will steal your heart in a New York minute! Puppies of all different shapes, sizes and colors make a run for showbiz in this city.

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies
programme.desc: Chicago may be known as the "Windy City" and true to style, these dogs will blow you away! Puggles and poodles and "All that Jazz" make up this pool of playful pooches. With cuteness as deep as the infamous pizza, Chicago turns it out!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies
programme.desc: In Miami, Hurricane CutePuppy is coming at full force and about to knock the flip-flops off these judges! These pups arrive from all over the Sunshine State to show what they're made of.

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies
programme.desc: After searching the country and sniffing out hundreds of dogs, the ultimate competition has arrived. The ten regional winners from each city have made it out to L.A. to compete for the first-ever title of "America's Cutest Puppy" and the grand prize.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Beverley Mahood meets with the Jensen family, who are looking for a puppy companion for their family dog, Dexter. They visit with the Linnois, the Minature Bernedoodle, and the Jarkie. Everyone has a favourite, but only one can be Dexter's new friend.

programme.desc: The cutest puppies. Nonstop.

programme.desc: Caress continues to extort Emily Fallmont; Clay, suffering from guilt, proposes marriage to Sammy Jo, Las Vega style; Michael is forced to tell Amanda the truth; Emily tells Buck of her past with Ben and fleeing from his rage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Using Emily's letter, Blake devises a way to regain his empire; Sammy Jo learns she is not pregnant, but keeps it a secret from Clay; fearing Michael Culhane's deceitful intentions.

programme.desc: Alexis relinquishes control of Denver-Carrington and the mansion back to Blake; Ben battles Alexis for equal control of Colbyco; Michael Culhane and Alexis form an alliance against Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Ben returns to Blake's aid and pulls him to safety, both narrowly escaping the devastation of the ensuing explosion; Blake suffers memory loss due to the explosion; Alexis leads Blake to believe they have been married for the past twenty-three years.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo informs Clay of her desire for an annulment to their marriage; Dominique is roughed up by thugs threatening her to cooperate with their boss, as Gary Tilden coincidentally returns to Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle suspects Blake's once passionate feelings for Alexis may still be lingering; Blake and Ben reach a mutual reconciliation; Amanda disappears to London; Leslie Carrington finds Ben.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Clay reluctantly signs the annulment papers to end his and Sammy Jo's marriage; Blake persuades Leslie Carrington to stay in Denver and give Ben a second chance; Adam proposes to Dana.

programme.title: DESTINATION WILD: WILD COLOMBIA
programme.desc: The Choc: Columbia's Wild Forest

programme.title: The Wildlife
programme.desc: Episode 4

programme.title: The Lembeh Strait Walking Fish
programme.desc: Whale sharks, manta rays, and other big fish were once common in the narrow Lembeh Strait in Indonesia, but overfishing has long since eradicated the larger species.

programme.title: Life In The World's Largest Crater
programme.desc: Just over two billion years ago, a meteorite the size of Table Mountain slammed into Earth just outside the present day town of Vredefort. It created a scar that is today recognised as the oldest and largest meteorite impact site in the world.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: The cloud rainforest is a unique ecosystem that grows in equatorial regions, perched on peaks of over two thousand meters, where clouds permanently deposit water and the weather is cold.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: It's a messy business but Global Radar finds there is a big future in all kinds of waste and the value in what we flush or toss away is astounding.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Charlotte has growing cynicism towards the owner of the emaciated black dog, when he repeatedly dodges his responsibility. Charlotte and Roxy set out on a house call to investigate.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: Whether by wing, fin or hoof, epic migrations are among nature's most awe-inspiring events. Animals undertake these arduous journeys, for many reasons: to find a mate, to give birth, or to move to new feeding grounds.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, big change is afoot. Cheetah Outreach has been given a big opportunity, but it will mean leaving their current home for a new location.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats: Episode 6
programme.desc: Finally the two rival gangs meet and a big battle ensues. The Gosa Gang are on their way home from the Whispering Forest and bump into their bitter enemies head on.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: Deploying his own tracking device, Te Radar tries to find out what happens to rubbish that washes into waterways and finds himself shocked by how much plastic floats across the world’s oceans only to soil pristine beaches in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Wild Uruguay
programme.desc: Uruguay's biodiversity is surprisingly greater than one would expect. We will find out why as we embark on a journey through its ecosystems and landscapes to discover its fauna.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore how different animal species react to impending death. We explore the factors that lead animals to their final resting places: disease, injury, predation, drought, famine.

programme.title: The Angel's Secret
programme.desc: Many know its name; few have seen it. Once present throughout Europe, the angel shark is now critically endangered and finds itself struggling off the coast of the Canary Islands. As unique as it is extraordinary, this species is full of secrets...

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Delarey drives through first thing in the morning to the Kruger Park to take slides to an Anthrax expert. Is it Anthrax?

programme.title: End Of The Big Cats
programme.desc: This final episode recaps our discoveries so far, and traces the disastrous journey into near- extinction for the Big Cats.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: In this final episode, Kristina shares her favourite highlights, humour or behind the scenes action from each of the 19 safari locations. It has indeed been an epic safari with encounters to remember for a lifetime.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tommy lays low after his Mustang is riddled with bullets; tensions run high with Ghost and Jason; Tommy enlists LaKeisha to help with his business; Tasha confronts Ghost about Terry Silver.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Dre remains in federal custody; Jason instructs Tommy and Ghost to kidnap Alicia Jiminez; Tommy teaches LaKeisha the drug game; Tariq's business begins to flourish; Tasha has a business plan of her own.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tasha sparks a new flame; Ghost utilizes his resources in an attempt to kill Tommy; Tariq's in over his head with the Italians; Dre forms an unlikely alliance; Proctor hatches a plan to gain custody of his daughter.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tasha revisits old habits when she begins to recruit soldiers for her new empire; Tariq pulls a ruse on Vincent; Proctor warns Tommy about a snitch; Ghost plans to take care of the snitch on his own terms.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: After being duped by Tariq, Vincent holds Tariq hostage; Ghost and Tommy call a temporary truce in order to face a common enemy; Tasha puts her differences to the side and turns to an unlikely ally for help.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost and Tasha butt heads on how to raise Tariq; Tate gets caught with his pants down; LaKeisha creates new enemies within Tommy's organization; Jason tasks Ghost and Tommy to work together.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: A Department of Justice agent is compromised in the press and then vanishes before she can be brought in.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: A serial killer, released from prison, disappears; someone is stalking Antonio.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Jess dreams about people who have disappeared and is teamed with an FBI agent to find a Senator's missing fiancée.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Brooke and Jess investigate the disappearance of an FBI cadet.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Jess battles insomnia; pressure builds to find a serial killer's next victim before time runs out.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: As Nine encourages Sage to moderate his ambitions, Collette takes him on a journey into the past, to rediscover his artistic origins; Odalie finds it difficult to find balance in her love life and dance; Zo takes Tal out to have fun a night.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Tal discovers a terrible family secret; Sage and the dancers develop a new and risky concept; Nine helps Rigo deal with his feelings for Poppy, while Poppy and Dondre confront their own feelings for each other.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two contestants are seated in the front of a car. The driver is blind folded and the passenger must navigate for them. Player is strapped down in a coffin and then covered with 500 Tarantulas.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will exit a helicopter and release a flag. They will be standing on platforms suspended in the air. Contestant must chew through the cow intestine. Contestants will ride a mini motorcycle across a beam that is suspended from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must get on a pole directly out, under the nose of a helicopter. Players will bob in cheese and then eat grasshoppers. Contestants are hung upside down into a Plexiglas tank filled with Eels. Contestants must drive up with only two wheels.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant will be put in a clear plex-glass tube that will be lifted up and placed just above the water. Snakes and lizards will be dumped in the box. Contestant will be standing on a plexi-glass incline pirtched on top of a roof in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing in either end of two large cylinders, suspended in the air over water. Player must grab a mouth full of insects, then place into a meat grinder using their mouth. Inside the tanker truck, it would be filled with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are placed in a box with two plexi-glass walls that will be lifted off the ground. Contestants will be served live snails. Contestants are seated in a car that is in the back of a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be dangling from a rope off the roof. Contestants will have to clear a bug splattered car windshield using only their mouth and face. The contestant will be standing on a beam suspended from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will stand on top of a truck as it speeds trying to grab as many flags. Contestants will shoot potatoes at a target using a shoulder mounted air cannon. The contestant must start the car, there are tractors driving towards their car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parent and the child will have to cross a beam above the water releasing flags along the way. Cockroaches are being poured into the box while the child sits in a box without a top. In this family stunt the child will start by standing on the dock.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A contestant will be seated in the driver's seat of a limousine, the second contestant will be in the trunk. The contestant will be tied into their seat and to the steering wheel of a automobile.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be laying on their back on a plexi-glass platform that is hung from a helicopter. Contestants will determine how much of the animals they will have to eat. Contestant will have to cross beams placing flags along the way.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be locked in a plexi-glass box that will be hung from a crane, lowered into the water. A contestant bobs into a tank of fluid. One will be driving the main car and the other will be driving the ramp car along a flatbed semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants sit on a bicycle on top of one of two semi trucks. Contestants have to pick up hornworms and squeeze the juice out into a glass. Contestant must walk on beam from one building to another.

programme.desc: While working as a substitute teacher at a high school, Jonathan assigns an overweight girl to tutor a troubled baseball star.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When money becomes short for Sully, he tries everything to make ends meet rather than accept help from Dr. Mike.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels attempt to save a troubled marriage when the neglected wife encounters a man with whom she was once in love.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: At a time when the country is on the brink of peace, Monica brings a group of Northern Ireland teenagers, both Protestant and Catholic, to America to discover the true meaning of peace.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels set out for a night of bowling and find enough needy patrons to "spare."

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels visit an art gallery where they help three people in need.

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: The absorbing martial arts film that exposes Ninjutsu, the lethal, little-known "Art of Invisibility"... which includes the use of hypnotism, explosives, and super-human fighting skills.

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: Sho Kosugi ("Enter the Ninja") delivers a heart-pounding display of strength, speed and lethal Ninja know-how in this action-packed thriller that takes us back to the good old days of the Kung Fu extravaganza.

programme.title: Bloodsport
programme.desc: Ninjitsu master Frank Dux journeys to Hong Kong to enter the Kumite, the Olympics of martial arts, and meets a beautiful American reporter. Before long he must face Chong-Li, a vicious Korean master of Tae Kwan Do, in a climactic fight to the finish.

programme.title: Bloodfist

programme.title: Lady Bloodfight
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Hong Kong, an American woman is beaten up and mugged by thugs. She's taken in by a martial arts master who trains her for a formidable fight competition known as the Kumite.

programme.title: American Ninja
programme.desc: Michael Dudikoff stars as Joe Armstrong, a one-man fighting machine. Serving in the army to avoid prison, Joe finds himself battling the deadly Black Star Order, as well as corrupt military leaders in order to bring down an illegal arms sale.

programme.title: American Ninja 2: The Confrontation
programme.desc: On a remote Caribbean island, Army Ranger Joe Armstrong saves an old friend from the clutches of "The Lion," an evil super-criminal who has kidnapped a local scientist and mass-produced an army of mutant Ninja warriors.

programme.title: American Ninja 3: Blood Hunt
programme.desc: Martial artist David Bradley takes the reins as Sean Davidson in this third installment of the wildly popular American Ninja franchise, teaming up with Steve James to battle a maniacal terrorist in yet another explosive action-packed adventure!

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay llega a un restaurante endeudado propiedad de dos ex meseras y las cosas están tan mal que Ramsay realiza una intervención para abordar el tema del liderazgo.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse se está muriendo por la falta de control de la gerencia en la calidad de la comida, con un dueño un poco grosero y su esposo, el copropietario, sentados en el bar bebiendo todo el día.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay hace el viaje a Carlstadt, Nueva Jersey, para visitar Grasshopper Also, un restaurante que ha visto días mejores. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Viajando al North End de Boston, el chef Ramsay pasa una semana en Davide, un restaurante italiano mal administrado por hermanos enemistados. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Providence, Rhode Island, para visitar DownCity, un restaurante con un avance detenido por un propietario obstinado y de mal genio. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Bridgeport, Connecticut, el chef Ramsay visita el Café Tavolini. Dos propietarios indiferentes observan cómo su restaurante se va a la ruina . Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Sherman Oaks, California, para rescatar a un restaurante francés del peligro mientras los dueños, hermano y hermana, se pelean por el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Durante su visita a Los Ángeles, el chef Ramsay se detiene en Capri. Este restaurante italiano está sucio, sirve comida terrible y está desordenado, todo gracias a un par de gemelos muy flojos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Pasadena, California, para poner en forma un restaurante especializado en cocina caribeña. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: After being admitted to the hospital with unexplained bleeding, 11-month-old Chad Shelton dies. Investigators and scientists frantically search for a cause when others from the same house fall ill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An Alaskan police officer finds a woman's body while on routine patrol of a public park. During the autopsy, the medical examiner preserves the portion of her rib cage which sustained the fatal wound.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Derrick Duehren returned to find his Oregon home burned to the ground. His wife's charred remains were later found in the rubble. Investigators set out to determine if it was an unfortunate accident or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This episode documents a deadly bombing at a church in Oakwood, Illinois, in December 1997.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, California firefighters battled ten arson fires in three weeks. When cigarettes and a scrap of paper connected the case to similar fires further north, the hunt was on for a dangerous pyromaniac.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and, after the initial investigation, the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fifteen-year-old boy dies from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while sitting in the lobby of his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, made-to-scale models and the latest in forensic animation are used to find the cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home after a meeting and discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered — but how?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space
programme.desc: Astronema switches bodies with Ashley to infiltrate the Astro Megaship and capture the Power Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space
programme.desc: The Rangers discover the cryogenically frozen Zhane, the Silver Ranger and Andros' best friend.

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space
programme.desc: Astronema questions her own motives as she travels to KO-35 to battle the Power Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space
programme.desc: The Power Rangers question whether they can trust Astronema when she offers to help them find Zordon.

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space
programme.desc: With a new ally aboard the Megaship, the Rangers race to save the Earth from an asteroid on a collision course with the planet.

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space
programme.desc: An old Ally returns to help Andros rescue his sister from Dark Specter.

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space
programme.desc: Astronema assembles a team of evil Psycho Rangers to solidify her power.

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space
programme.desc: Carlos must appease a little girl's every whim to keep his identity a secret.

programme.title: Power Rangers: In Space

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de que las gallinas los despiertan en sus habitaciones, los concursantes deben cocinar para la cena familiar lo que al principio les cantó.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos compiten para hacer la mayor cantidad posible de pasta para la cena de la noche, y un accidente en la cocina lleva a un competidor al hospital.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío para los once Chefs restantes: hacer una pizza gourmet. Los ganadores disfrutan de hamburguesas gourmet en Santa Bárbara mientras los perdedores preparan la cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los diez Chefs restantes complazcan a una adolescente exigente que vino a Hell's Kitchen para celebrar su fiesta de cumpleaños.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay hace que los nueve Chefs restantes se sometan a una prueba de sabor con los ojos vendados. Los ganadores pueden ir a un spa; los perdedores deben limpiar la habitación.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay pide un voluntario para cambiar de bando. La dinámica del grupo cambia a medida que los equipos enfrentan su próximo desafío: crear cuatro platos con veinte ingredientes específicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el desafío de apertura, los dos equipos compiten en una carrera de relevos. Los ganadores tienen lecciones de surf, mientras que los perdedores deben limpiar Hell's Kitchen de arriba a abajo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay inspira a los seis concursantes, llevándolos al restaurante que administrará el ganador de esta temporada. El ganador de la temporada 3, Rock Harper, hace una aparición especial.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los cinco Chefs restantes a que enseñen a amas de casa con problemas en la cocina a preparar una comida gourmet. El ganador recibe consejos culinarios de los Chefs Mark Peel y Ben Ford.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los últimos cuatro participantes preparan un almuerzo para los invitados sorpresa: ochenta delicadas madres embarazadas. El Chef que tenga el plato preferido gana un boleto de compras de $1,000. Mientras los demás deben limpiar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay prepara un desayuno para los Chefs restantes y luego les pide que reproduzcan el plato. Más tarde, Ramsay sabotea la cena para ver cómo reaccionan los competidores ante la adversidad.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas visitan el restaurante del Chef Ramsay en Nueva York, donde los Chefs ejecutivos de otros restaurantes de Ramsay encuentran que sus platos son únicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: La cuarta temporada llega a su fin con los finalistas trabajando junto a los competidores previamente eliminados para el servicio de cena final.
